HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Mar-21-2012 Text Ruling

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Dec-14-2011 Denied

Application Pending For Waiver Of Additional Court Fees And Costs Pursuant To G.C. 68633, Crc 3.51, 8.26, And 8.818
Off Calendar Dec-14-2011 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-12-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Patrick O'Sullivan is present.
Attorney Guadalupe Gamino appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Rene Martinez is present.
Attorney John Weinstein representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504b, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of DEC-12-2011 is vacated.
